title: I am Yogananda the New Spirit Being - I am an Eleninian, Stoned

transcript.text: Hello. I am Yogananda. This is my new spiritual name. I am, I was born a new spirit being just last week.
During the Elenin alignment is what activated me. So I am an Eleninian.
An Eleninian is somebody who becomes enlightened on the Elenin alignment.
It was the long-forecasted destruction of mankind, next big natural catastrophe.
But instead of a natural catastrophe, a great spiritual awakening occurs.
For me, I made my transition into Yogananda by being a raw foodist, raw fruit and vegetables only.
The only food at the supermarket. No alcohol, no drugs, except for now.
And I work out 8 to 12 to 14 hours a day every single day in the gym.
And I walk a marathon every single day. And while I'm working on my site on the treadmill.
And I'm organizing my van. Well, not yet.
The van's a little bit disheveled, but I'll organize it. I'll organize it today.
And I'm making coffee. Oh yes. And working on the site as God grows his plants.
Just growing it as it grows.
And not being addicted to it as the crack head is addicted to the crack pipe.
This is Yogananda.
The super being.
And the birthing came.
And the great alignment.
So the next great alignment's to come.
It is only for spiritual awakening.
And it is done with the time of the earthquakes.
So.
